Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action - Person With Disability
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Person with a Disability Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Denise Doucette, CSR#5963. Telephone # 707 246 3323. (514)
Lawrence E. Biegel, of the Biegel Law Firm; Peter J. Koenig, and Beau R. Burbidge of Walker, Hamilton & Koenig appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Debra Thienngern, mother and guardian ad litem for person with a Disability Tanya Thienngern.
Mercy L. Hall, Esq., of Myers Urbatsch, P.C. Special Needs Trust Attorney, present in court.
Joseph Devine, Esq., appearing for Defendants Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc.
Petitioner Debra Thienngern appearing via CourtCall.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $2,000,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $783,257.93 payable to Walker, Hamilton & Koenig LLP and The Biegel Law Firm
Reimbursement for medial and all othe expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $41,855.17.
Other authorized disbursements payable directly to third parties in the total amount of $278,135.50 see attachment 7c(1)(d) to Order.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment $1,103,248.60.
A net balance of $896,751.40 by one or more checks in the total amount of $896,751.40 drawn payable to the Trustee of the Tanyua Thienngern Special Needs Trust.
Court signed Order Approving Compromise in open court.
Status Hearing Scheduled on June 19, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt and acknowledgment of Approval of Probate Court of Special Needs Trust, Accounting of Money paid into Special Needs Trust as of June 1, 2014. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
